query:
SELECT id, userId, executionType, status, startedAt, finishedAt, itemsScraped, newItems, errorMessage 
FROM scrapingLogs 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute SELECT id, userId, executionType, status, startedAt, finishedAt, itemsScraped, newItems, errorMessage 
FROM scrapingLogs 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
